items.text: Define boolean variable heating_request for the controller.
items.fragment: Define boolean variable heating_request for the controller.
items.requirement_fragment: Define boolean variable heating_request for the controller.

items.text: Define boolean variable cooling_request for the controller.
items.fragment: Define boolean variable cooling_request for the controller.
items.requirement_fragment: Define boolean variable cooling_request for the controller.

items.text: heating_request is true iff user_request.heater_on is true and user_request.cooler_on is false.
items.fragment: heating_request is true iff user_request.heater_on is true and user_request.cooler_on is false.
items.requirement_fragment: heating_request is true iff user_request.heater_on is true and user_request.cooler_on is false.

items.text: cooling_request is true iff user_request.cooler_on is true and user_request.heater_on is false.
items.fragment: cooling_request is true iff user_request.cooler_on is true and user_request.heater_on is false.
items.requirement_fragment: cooling_request is true iff user_request.cooler_on is true and user_request.heater_on is false.

items.text: heater_on may be true only if heating_request is true and tempin <= 20.
items.fragment: heater_on may be true only if heating_request is true and tempin <= 20.
items.requirement_fragment: heater_on may be true only if heating_request is true and tempin <= 20.

items.text: cooler_on may be true only if cooling_request is true and tempin > 0.
items.fragment: cooler_on may be true only if cooling_request is true and tempin > 0.
items.requirement_fragment: cooler_on may be true only if cooling_request is true and tempin > 0.
